title: viola perreniformis
intro: Viola perreniformis, also known as the common blue violet or pansy violet, is a flowering plant species within the violet genus that is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola perreniformis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies for its various health benefits.
